title: Copilot not including wwFormulas in generated code
symptom: The generated code from the copilot does not include necessary wwFormulas, leading to errors and empty values in the output.
applies_when: Using weweb copilot to generate code
not_this_if: No errors in the generated code
root_cause: The weweb copilot may sometimes fail to include essential components like wwFormulas in the generated code, which can lead to incomplete or non-functional scripts.
fix_steps: Check the generated code for missing wwFormulas
Manually add the necessary wwFormulas to the code
Test the code to ensure it produces the expected output
agent_instruction: Ensure that the generated code includes all necessary wwFormulas and test it.
